meta.sourceNote: Versions are scraped weekly from docs.fortinet.com and cross-referenced against the Fortinet recommended-release KB. FortiOS-family firmware was hand-verified on 2026-05-13; other products are awaiting the next scraper run. Cloud / SaaS products carry no firmware version.

products.name: FortiGate / FortiOS
products.shortDescription: Next-generation firewall with integrated SD-WAN, ZTNA, and Security Fabric.

products.name: FortiGate-5000 Series
products.shortDescription: Chassis-based hyperscale NGFW for service provider and data center cores.

products.name: FortiGate-6000 Series
products.shortDescription: Chassis platform delivering hyperscale firewall throughput with FPC and FIM modularity.

products.name: FortiGate-7000 Series
products.shortDescription: Highest-capacity FortiGate chassis line for hyperscale and core data center deployments.

products.name: FortiCarrier
products.shortDescription: Carrier-grade FortiGate variant with GTP, SCTP, and mobile core security features for telcos.

eol.notes: FortiGate variant for carrier and telco deployments. Licensed on supported FortiGate platforms.

products.name: FortiManager
products.shortDescription: Centralized policy, configuration, and SD-WAN orchestration for the Security Fabric.

products.name: FortiAIOps
products.shortDescription: AI-driven network operations with anomaly detection and root-cause analysis across Fabric devices.

products.name: FortiConverter
products.shortDescription: Migration tooling that converts third-party firewall configs to FortiGate policy. Available as on-prem tool or cloud service.

eol.notes: Two variants — Converter Tool (on-prem Windows) and Converter Service (cloud).

products.name: FortiFlex
products.shortDescription: Point-based flex licensing vehicle for VM and cloud Fortinet products. Not a product, a consumption model.

eol.notes: Consumption-based licensing platform, not a discrete product.

products.name: Managed FortiGate Service
products.shortDescription: Fortinet-operated FortiGate management for customers outsourcing day-to-day firewall ops (FMaaS).

products.name: FortiSwitch
products.shortDescription: Secure managed switches with FortiLink integration to FortiGate for unified Security Fabric LAN control.

products.name: FortiSwitch Manager
products.shortDescription: Standalone management appliance for FortiSwitch deployments that operate without an upstream FortiGate.

products.name: FortiAP / FortiWiFi
products.shortDescription: Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 6E access points managed by FortiGate or FortiLAN Cloud with integrated Security Fabric.

products.name: FortiAP-U Series
products.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade high-density APs from the Meru acquisition, managed separately from FortiAP.

eol.notes: Separate firmware track from FortiAP. Roadmap convergence is ongoing.

products.name: FortiEdge Cloud
products.shortDescription: Cloud-managed LAN edge controller for FortiAP and FortiSwitch in lightweight deployments.

products.name: FortiNAC-F
products.shortDescription: Current-generation network access control with IoT visibility and OT segmentation. Successor to legacy FortiNAC.

eol.notes: Current NAC product. Legacy FortiNAC remains documented separately for in-flight deployments.

products.name: FortiNAC (legacy)
products.shortDescription: Original FortiNAC product line. Maintained for existing deployments; new customers should deploy FortiNAC-F.

eol.notes: Legacy line. Migration path is FortiNAC-F.

products.name: FortiLAN Cloud
products.shortDescription: SaaS cloud management for FortiAP and FortiSwitch fleets.

products.name: FortiPresence
products.shortDescription: Location analytics and presence detection layered on FortiAP wireless infrastructure.

products.name: FortiExtender
products.shortDescription: LTE and 5G cellular gateway for primary WAN, backup WAN, and SD-WAN failover.

products.name: FortiWAN (legacy)
products.shortDescription: WAN load balancer and predecessor to FortiGate SD-WAN. Legacy product, being phased out.

eol.notes: Migration path is FortiGate SD-WAN.

products.name: FortiVoice
products.shortDescription: Enterprise voice and UCaaS platform with PBX, VoIP, and mobile integration.

products.name: FortiFone
products.shortDescription: IP desk and softphone endpoints paired with FortiVoice for enterprise telephony.

products.name: FortiCamera
products.shortDescription: IP surveillance cameras managed by FortiRecorder and FortiCentral.

products.name: FortiRecorder
products.shortDescription: Network video recorder for FortiCamera deployments with motion analytics and event retention.

products.name: FortiCentral
products.shortDescription: Video management software for centralized FortiCamera and FortiRecorder operations.

products.name: FortiExplorer / FortiExplorer Go
products.shortDescription: Mobile and desktop apps for FortiGate provisioning, monitoring, and remote management.

eol.notes: FortiExplorer Go is the lightweight iOS provisioning variant.

products.name: FortiZTP
products.shortDescription: Zero-touch provisioning service that ships pre-registered FortiGate, FortiAP, and FortiSwitch to remote sites.

products.name: FortiRPS
products.shortDescription: Redundant power supply for select FortiSwitch chassis. Hardware accessory only.

products.name: FortiIPAM
products.shortDescription: IP address management and DDI service integrated with the Security Fabric.

products.name: FortiDNS
products.shortDescription: DNS service with DDI, DNS filtering, and DNSSEC for enterprise networks.

products.name: FortiPlanner
products.shortDescription: RF site survey and wireless capacity planning tool for FortiAP deployments.

products.name: FortiSASE
products.shortDescription: Single-vendor SASE: cloud-delivered SWG, ZTNA, CASB, and FWaaS for hybrid workers and branches.

products.name: FortiSASE Sovereign
products.shortDescription: Customer-controlled FortiSASE deployment for data residency, government, and regulated workloads.

products.name: FortiBranchSASE
products.shortDescription: Thin-edge branch SASE bundling FortiAP, FortiSwitch, and FortiExtender connectivity into FortiSASE.

products.name: FortiProxy
products.shortDescription: Secure web gateway with explicit proxy, DNS filtering, CASB, and ZTNA enforcement.

products.name: FortiMonitor
products.shortDescription: SaaS network performance monitoring and digital experience monitoring across SD-WAN, SASE, and on-prem.

products.name: Lacework FortiCNAPP
products.shortDescription: Cloud-native application protection platform: CSPM, CWPP, runtime, vulnerability, and IaC across AWS, Azure, GCP.

eol.notes: From the Lacework acquisition. Full CNAPP suite; consolidates FortiCNP and FortiCWP capabilities.

products.name: FortiDevSec
products.shortDescription: DevSecOps platform with SAST, SCA, secrets scanning, and IaC scanning wired into CI/CD pipelines.

products.name: FortiDAST
products.shortDescription: Dynamic application security testing for web and API workloads. Authenticated crawls and OWASP coverage.

products.name: FortiCNP
products.shortDescription: AWS-focused cloud-native protection (CSPM). Largely superseded by Lacework FortiCNAPP.

eol.notes: Migration path is Lacework FortiCNAPP.

products.name: FortiCWP
products.shortDescription: Legacy cloud workload protection. Being consolidated into Lacework FortiCNAPP.

eol.notes: Migration path is Lacework FortiCNAPP.

products.name: FortiCASB
products.shortDescription: API-based cloud access security broker for SaaS visibility, DLP, and shadow IT control.

products.name: FortiAppSec Cloud
products.shortDescription: SaaS WAF, bot management, API security, and DDoS protection for cloud-delivered apps.

products.name: FortiClient
products.shortDescription: Endpoint agent for ZTNA, VPN, EDR, web filtering, and posture; managed by FortiClient EMS.

eol.notes: Agent component. Managed by FortiClient EMS (on-prem) or FortiClient Cloud (SaaS).

products.name: FortiClient Cloud
products.shortDescription: Cloud-hosted FortiClient EMS for endpoint management without on-prem servers.

products.name: FortiWeb
products.shortDescription: Web application and API protection with bot defense, OWASP coverage, and ML-driven anomaly detection.

products.name: FortiADC
products.shortDescription: Application delivery controller with load balancing, SSL offload, GSLB, and link load balancing.

products.name: FortiGSLB
products.shortDescription: SaaS global server load balancing layered on FortiADC for DNS-based traffic steering.

eol.notes: FortiGSLB is the SaaS version of FortiADC load balancing.

products.name: FortiAnalyzer
products.shortDescription: Log management, analytics, reporting, and FortiView across the Security Fabric.

products.name: FortiAnalyzer BigData
products.shortDescription: Hadoop-backed FortiAnalyzer for very high-volume log ingestion at carrier and MSSP scale.

products.name: FortiSIEM
products.shortDescription: Event correlation, UEBA, and compliance reporting across security and IT infrastructure.

products.name: FortiSOAR
products.shortDescription: SOAR platform with playbooks, case management, and 600+ integrations for SOC automation.

eol.notes: Available as on-prem VM and as FortiSOAR Cloud (SaaS).

products.name: SOC-as-a-Service
products.shortDescription: Fortinet-operated managed detection and response service backed by FortiGuard analysts.

products.name: FortiTIP Cloud
products.shortDescription: Threat intelligence platform with IOC management and feed orchestration from FortiGuard.

products.name: FortiEDR / FortiXDR
products.shortDescription: Post-execution EDR with kernel-level prevention, automated response, and XDR correlation.

eol.notes: FortiXDR is the cross-domain correlation overlay on FortiEDR telemetry.

products.name: FortiEndpoint
products.shortDescription: Unified endpoint protection and management bundling FortiClient with EDR-grade controls.

products.name: FortiInsight
products.shortDescription: User and entity behavior analytics with insider threat scoring and DLP context.

products.name: FortiDLP
products.shortDescription: Data loss prevention with agent-based content inspection, policy enforcement, and exfiltration controls.

eol.notes: Three doc entries on docs.fortinet.com: FortiDLP, FortiDLP Agent, FortiDLP Policies.

products.name: FortiAuthenticator
products.shortDescription: Identity, MFA, RADIUS, SAML SSO, and PKI services for the Security Fabric.

products.name: FortiAuthenticator Cloud
products.shortDescription: SaaS MFA and identity services without the on-prem appliance.

products.name: FortiToken
products.shortDescription: Hardware and mobile OTP tokens supporting TOTP, push, and biometric MFA.

products.name: FortiIdentity Cloud
products.shortDescription: SaaS identity-as-a-service with workforce SSO, MFA, and lifecycle management.

products.name: FortiPAM
products.shortDescription: Privileged access management with credential vaulting, session recording, and just-in-time access.

products.name: FortiMail
products.shortDescription: Secure email gateway with anti-spam, anti-phishing, sandboxing, and outbound DLP.

products.name: FortiPhish
products.shortDescription: Managed phishing simulation service for measuring and improving user susceptibility.

products.name: Security Awareness and Training
products.shortDescription: Cloud-delivered security awareness training with built-in phishing simulations.

products.name: FortiSandbox
products.shortDescription: Advanced threat protection sandbox with static, dynamic, and AI-based file analysis.

products.name: FortiNDR
products.shortDescription: Network detection and response with ML traffic analysis for east-west and encrypted threats.

products.name: FortiNDR Cloud
products.shortDescription: SaaS network detection and response with managed analyst escalation.

products.name: FortiDeceptor
products.shortDescription: Decoy and lure platform for lateral movement detection across IT and OT networks.

eol.notes: Also available as FortiDeceptor DaaS (managed cloud deception).

products.name: FortiRecon
products.shortDescription: External attack surface management with dark web monitoring and brand protection.

products.name: FortiIsolator
products.shortDescription: Remote browser isolation that renders untrusted web content off-endpoint to neutralize zero-days.

products.name: FortiPolicy
products.shortDescription: Policy automation and compliance for firewall rules across heterogeneous estates.

products.name: FortiPortal
products.shortDescription: MSSP multi-tenant portal for Fortinet device management with customer-facing reporting.

products.name: FortiTester
products.shortDescription: Network performance and security validation appliance. EOL.

eol.notes: EOL — no replacement product from Fortinet.

products.name: FortiSRA
products.shortDescription: Secure remote access for OT and ICS environments. EOL — customers migrate to FortiClient ZTNA or FortiPAM.

eol.notes: EOL. Migration paths: FortiClient ZTNA for end-user remote access, FortiPAM for privileged session control.

products.name: FortiDB
products.shortDescription: Database activity monitoring and database security. Legacy product.

eol.notes: Legacy database security product. Limited active development.

products.name: FortiCache
products.shortDescription: Web caching and WAN optimization. Legacy product, largely deprecated.

eol.notes: Legacy. Caching capability folded into other products.

products.name: FortiHypervisor
products.shortDescription: Hypervisor for hosting Fortinet VNFs on FortiGate hardware platforms.

products.name: FortiCore
products.shortDescription: Embedded FortiOS variant for OEM and white-label integrations.

products.name: FortiBridge
products.shortDescription: Inline bypass appliance that fails open to keep traffic flowing during inline security device failure.

products.name: FortiTap
products.shortDescription: Passive network tap for traffic capture into monitoring and inspection stacks.

products.name: FortiTelemetry
products.shortDescription: Telemetry plane for Fabric device data collection and visibility.

products.name: FortiSAT
products.shortDescription: Satellite connectivity option for remote and maritime SD-WAN sites.

products.name: FortiGuest
products.shortDescription: Guest WiFi portal and captive-portal management with self-service registration.

products.name: FortiWLM (legacy)
products.shortDescription: Wireless LAN manager from the Meru acquisition. Legacy.

eol.notes: Legacy WLAN management from Meru. Limited new deployments.

products.name: FortiBalancer (legacy)
products.shortDescription: Application load balancer line. Legacy/EOL — superseded by FortiADC.

eol.notes: Migration path is FortiADC.

products.name: AscenLink (legacy)
products.shortDescription: WAN load balancing line predating FortiWAN. Legacy/EOL.

eol.notes: Migration path is FortiGate SD-WAN.

products.name: Overlay-as-a-Service
products.shortDescription: Managed SD-WAN overlay service that operates fabric tunnels on behalf of the customer.

products.name: FortiData
products.shortDescription: Secure storage and data management platform within the Security Fabric.
